data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for recurring annual holiday templates.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Recurring annual holiday templates', but there is no evidence provided that explicitly checks for the existence or functionality of such templates. The linked use case mentions the need for these templates, yet the prior steps do not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm their implementation. Therefore, the requirement remains unverified, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or persisted state checks for recurring annual holiday templates.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence and functionality of recurring annual holiday templates.
